Interface IBasicImageView

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an image view associated with a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("EEE445DB-07F7-4FEC-BAF7-F63251E05569")]
public interface IBasicImageView
